body.title: Inference proxy: Health monitor + internal Store
body.result: Built in 715eca0a — sources/models/rules/health all in devices/inference/, 14 tests passing
body.description:
Health monitor pings each Source every 60s, marks availability, feeds back to Rules. Internal Store records every request: caller_id, model_id, input_tokens, output_tokens, cost_usd, latency_ms, timestamp. Billing query = GROUP BY caller_id. Semantic cache: hash prompt → cached response, TTL 1h.

**Affected files:** devices/inference/health_monitor.py, devices/inference/store.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** In scope: health pinger, request log, billing aggregation, prompt cache. Out of scope: external billing integrations.
**Completion criteria:** (1) Downed source detected within 2 poll cycles. (2) Per-caller cost query accurate. (3) Identical prompt served from cache on second call.
